metadata.description: La Oficina — build your AI agent team with persistent memory, collaborating on your projects. / Crea tu equipo de agentes de IA con memoria persistente que colaboran en tus proyectos.

plugins.name: agent-factory
plugins.description: The generator: creates complete agents (identity + research-backed memory + skills) for any domain with /create-agent (alias /crear-agente), powered by deep research (/recursive-research). Works in the user's language.

plugins.name: agent-office
plugins.description: Live coordination between agents on the same project: presence, mentions with inbox, resource claims. Optional add-on (beta) — everything works without it.
